name: Password Policy Compliance Check
description: Checks password policy compliance across all user accounts. Queries the identity provider for password age, complexity compliance, and MFA enrollment status. Riggs AI identifies users violating password policies (expired passwords, no MFA, weak password indicators). Non-compliant users are flagged with forced password resets, and a compliance report is sent to the security team.
author: T1 Agentics

required_integrations.name: Microsoft Graph
required_integrations.reason: Query user accounts for password age, complexity, and MFA enrollment status

required_integrations.name: Jira
required_integrations.reason: Create tracking ticket for password policy enforcement actions

required_integrations.name: Slack
required_integrations.reason: Notify security team with password policy compliance report

config.description: Triggers weekly password policy compliance check across all user accounts
Query identity provider for all active users' password age, policies, and MFA status

config.additional_instructions: Analyze password policy compliance: identify users with passwords older than 90 days, users without MFA enrolled, accounts with password-never-expires flag, and service accounts with stale credentials. Calculate overall compliance percentage.
config.description: AI-powered analysis of password policy compliance across all accounts
Routes based on whether users violating password policy were identified
Force password reset for all non-compliant users on their next login

parameters.summary: Password Policy Enforcement: {{analyze_1.non_compliant_count}} users forced to reset

config.description: Create a Jira ticket documenting the password policy enforcement actions
Send weekly password policy compliance report to security team

parameters.note: Weekly password policy check complete. 100% compliance. All users meet password age, complexity, and MFA requirements.

config.description: Password policy compliance check complete -- enforcement actions taken and documented
